sentences.arabic: الْمَشْيُ فِي الْهَوَاءِ الطَّلْقِ رِيَاضَةٌ بَسِيطَةٌ وَمُفِيدَةٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Hodanje na svježem zraku je jednostavna i veoma korisna vježba.
sentences.translationEn: Walking in the fresh air is a simple and very beneficial exercise.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ قَبْلَ الْفُطُورِ.
sentences.translation: Hodam po trideset minuta svakog jutra prije doručka.
sentences.translationEn: I walk for thirty minutes every morning before breakfast.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ تُسَاعِدُنِي عَلَى الشُّعُورِ بِالنَّشَاطِ طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ova navika mi pomaže da se osjećam energično tokom cijelog dana.
sentences.translationEn: This habit helps me feel energetic throughout the day.
